history.notes: 母音検知統合 (v0.16.3): 周波数解析によるAIUEO母音検知を実装。リアルタイム・リップシンクの精度を大幅に向上し、HUDによるキャリブレーション機能を追加。
STABLE DEPLOYMENT (v0.16.1): Synchronized with latest dev features.
STABLE DEPLOYMENT (v0.16.0): Synchronized with latest dev features.
STABLE DEPLOYMENT (v0.15.128): Synchronized with latest dev features.

MAJOR UPDATE (v0.15.126): Ported 'Miko Edition' from dev. New sidebar UI, Tenko Mode (fox ears), high-fidelity hair physics, and optimized breathing rhythms. This version now serves as the unified stable baseline.

STABLE DEPLOYMENT (v0.15.118): Verified stable build with synchronized 16-slider UI. Standardized mouth thresholds (U=2, I=14) and ensured consistent facial geometry proportions. This version is the current stable baseline.
STABLE DEPLOYMENT (v0.15.68): Integrated real-time Breathing Animation and significantly improved Smile sensitivity.
STABLE DEPLOYMENT (v0.15.66): Backported high-fidelity features from dev: Independent winks, crescent smile assets, and Scientific HUD.
STABLE PRODUCTION RELEASE: Finalized 5-vowel lip-sync and eye stabilization.
